title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Corgi, co-founded by Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan, raised $108M Series A by rebuilding the insurance industry from scratch rather than modernizing legacy carriers. The founders attribute success to pursuing the most ambitious version of their idea and relentless execution over two years despite repeated near-failures.
